name: seameet
description: Connect Claude to SeaMeet recordings, transcripts, summaries, screenshots, and recording controls.
long_description: Connects Claude to SeaMeet. When the SeaMeet desktop app is installed and running, Claude can start/stop/pause screen and audio recordings, take screenshots, read the live transcript mid-meeting, retrieve AI artifacts (summaries, transcripts, action items, key decisions, chapters, OCR), search recordings, and save its own notes back to a recording. When desktop mode is unavailable, the same MCP package can authorize through the SeaMeet web app to read synced cloud recordings, transcripts, summaries, and webhooks. Download SeaMeet: https://seameet.ai/download/

tools.name: seameet_stop_recording
tools.description: Stop the active recording and get the saved file path

tools.name: seameet_get_live_transcript
tools.description: Read the live transcript while a recording is running

tools.name: seameet_get_artifact
tools.description: Read AI artifacts: summary, transcription, action items, key decisions, chapters, OCR

tools.name: seameet_search_text
tools.description: Search across every recording's transcripts and summaries
